concept: Diversity / The Openness to Many Lights
description: The quality of having many different forms, types, ideas, etc. It is seen as a source of beauty, resilience, and collective wisdom.
rationale: The word sparkles with the liquid 'li', like light refracting through water into countless dancing colors. This flows into 'no', acknowledging that diversity begins in the mind—in our capacity to perceive and appreciate difference. The final vowel sequence 'o.a' opens wide, creating space for all forms of beauty to flourish. The entire word flows like a stream that welcomes every tributary, knowing that each adds to the richness of the whole. There's no hierarchy in these sounds, no center dominating—just the fluid celebration of multiplicity that makes life resilient and beautiful.
